name: Security Audit Finding
about: Report a security vulnerability or audit finding
title: "[AUDIT] "
labels: security, audit
assignees: NeaBouli
---

## Contract
<!-- Which contract? e.g. InfernoToken.sol, IFRLock.sol -->

## Severity
<!-- Critical / High / Medium / Low / Informational -->

## Category
<!-- Reentrancy / Access Control / Integer Overflow / Front-running /
     Centralization / Logic Error / Gas / Other -->

## Description
<!-- Clear description of the finding -->

## Proof of Concept
<!-- Code snippet or test demonstrating the issue -->
```solidity
// Your PoC here
```

## Impact
<!-- What could an attacker do? What is at risk? -->

## Recommendation
<!-- How should this be fixed? -->

## References
<!-- Links to similar findings, SWC registry, etc. -->

This project has no bug bounty program yet — submissions are voluntary.*
